title: Black And White Intellectual Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Black And White Intellectual Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: pensive adult man with round glasses, black sweater, metal wristwatch and pencil raised near his face. Scene / Context: dark studio backdrop, gaze tilted upward, shallow depth of field. Source Recipe Translation: black-and-white intellectual portrait. Preserve these source mechanics: dramatic black and white studio portrait, Rembrandt lighting, deep shadows, high contrast, minimalist editorial atmosphere. Concrete social variant uses pensive adult man with round glasses, black sweater, metal wristwatch and pencil raised near his face in dark studio backdrop, gaze tilted upward, shallow depth of field. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: dramatic black and white studio portrait, Rembrandt lighting, deep shadows, high contrast, minimalist editorial atmosphere; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: no visible text; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictional or generic subjects only, publication-safe, no real logo or unauthorized likeness; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
